title: TeamProjectE
description: Share ProjectE knowledge and EMC with friends
body:
TeamProjectE is an addon for ProjectE (Equivalent Exchange) that replaces the original knowledge and EMC system with a unified global pool shared by all players.

Knowledge and EMC value are shared across the entire server instance, so this mod is best suited for small private servers and playing with friends via LAN.

**Note:** installing this mod on existing playthrough will shadow save data. As such, your EMC value and learned items will disappear. It is advisable that all players pull everything out of the Transmutation Table before installing this mod.
